you see um simplify it because you are more likely even yourself to remember what's happening in that contract especially when there are lots of lines of code if it's actually something simple that you can explain relevant and ask have someone or a duck um who you're trying to explain the protocol of the function to uh and uh that's what I'm saying the the story scenarios you could say well just imagine I'm someone who wants to who have too much money I want to stick it somewhere to earn some profit well I can

the gaps in your knowledge because you're very unlikely to read function once uh even nine by nine and then really be able to explain what's happening uh so there's that you read that's a function you explain it as simply as possible as if you were explaining it to five years old and then you reread that function to identify what you lacked uh what what maybe should have happened and when you're trying to identify those gaps in knowledge you can actually start writing now down questions like why didn't I

something else and then you can even compare outputs from what you did before such a thing and what happens after uh as an example you could compare like what if I'm supplying uh let's say one eater to the system and then revert and try to supply uh 0.5 meter to the system and compare how much you gain Maybe then you'd be best opening lots of small positions I don't know but you can actually compare the outputs by using snapshots and reverting to the snapshot to get back the state and compare the
